  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List all expressions and their current weights for a persona's VRM."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/personas/{id}/vrm/expressions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all expressions and their current weights for a persona's VRM.
